calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: SD-032d PCC-analog metastability scalar -- substrate validation (deterministic arithmetic + agent integration)
items.notes: Substrate validation for SD-032d PCC-analog (IMPLEMENTED 2026-04-19). SD-032d is non-trainable arithmetic, so primary validation is deterministic API + arithmetic checks. C1 baseline_neutral: stability within 0.01 of baseline=0.5 with all-neutral inputs. C2 fatigue_monotone: stability strictly decreasing across drive_level 0.0/0.5/1.0 (falsification-signature direct test). C3 offline_recency_monotone: stability decreasing as steps_since_offline grows 0/250/500/1000 (saturates at window). C4 offline_reset_hook: note_offline_entry resets counter + restores stability. C5 success_ema_convergence: ema > 0.95 after 200 outcomes at alpha=0.02. C6 threshold_modulation: SalienceCoordinator effective_threshold strictly increasing in pcc_stability across 0.1/0.5/0.9 (MECH-259 wiring confirmed). C7 agent_integration: REEAgent select_action populates _pcc_last_tick AND injects pcc_stability into coordinator before tick. C8 backward_compat: use_pcc_analog=False -> agent.pcc is None and convenience hooks no-op. PASS = all 8 checks. Behavioural falsification of rest-driven mode-switch-rate signature requires combined SD-032a+SD-032c+SD-032d 4-arm 2x2 follow-up once cluster fully landed. experiment_purpose=diagnostic.

items.title: SD-032c AIC-analog descending modulation -- reduced-compute retest of EXQ-325c (DLAPTOP-4 pinned)
items.notes: Fix for V3-EXQ-325c ERROR (exit -15 SIGTERM at 33 min on ree-cloud-1; external termination during governance window, not a code crash). Compute reduced: 3 seeds x 4 conditions x 150 train + 30 eval eps (was 5x4x300+30). PASS threshold >=2/3 seeds (was >=3/5). Mechanism under test and C1-C5 criteria unchanged from EXQ-325c. machine_affinity pinned to DLAPTOP-4.local to avoid shared-vCPU preemption. experiment_purpose=evidence. On PASS: supports SD-032c structural drive-dependence (C4 falsification signature) and SD-021 attenuation via the AIC-analog re-routed path.

items.title: SD-016 cue_action_proj wiring diagnostic -- BASELINE vs SUPERVISED (diagnostic probe)
items.notes: Diagnostic probe testing the V3-EXQ-418a/418b wiring gap: action_bias_div=0.0000 despite sd016_enabled and terrain_loss. Hypothesis: cue_action_proj receives no gradient (detached action_bias + non-differentiable CEM argmax). Two arms: BASELINE mirrors EXQ-418a WITHOUT_SLEEP condition exactly; SUPERVISED adds auxiliary loss MSE(cue_action_proj(cue_context), E2.action_object(z_world, a_executed).detach()) with lambda=0.5. Gradient hook on cue_action_proj.weight records per-step grad norm. Acceptance: C1 BASELINE mean_grad_norm<1e-7 AND action_bias_div<0.01 in 2/2 seeds (diagnosis confirmed); C2 SUPERVISED mean_grad_norm>1e-5 AND action_bias_div>0.05 in 2/2 seeds (fix path viable); C3 drift_ratio SUPERVISED/BASELINE > 10x. PASS = C1 AND C2. Smoke-test (dry-run) already demonstrates BASELINE zero-grad and SUPERVISED grad~8e-3 with weight delta 0.21. experiment_purpose=diagnostic. evidence_direction=diagnostic (not evidence). Result DOES NOT weight SD-016 claim; informs whether fix via supervised cue_action_loss is viable or whether CEM must be replaced with a differentiable approximation.
